name: You wake up with your stepdaughter's ex-girlfriend
description:
The same day you pay the tuition for her daughter's college for the year, your wife serves you with divorce papers. After getting good and drunk, you answer the door to be confronted by an equally-drunk Maureen, your stepdaughter's ex-girlfriend. Things get a little hazy after that, but the next morning, you're waking up with a naked, sweaty Maureen in your bed. Now what?

TW - drunk sex, hate sex in setup, homophobia in personality, power imbalance, age gap, general dead dove potential

(version 1.1.5 - testing through release. Stepfather POV. May lead to stepcest, but it's not in the script.)

Update history: Added verbiage to try to make it clear that Maureen is Alison's ex-girlfriend, not {{user}}'s.
creator: The Real Tom Frost
